events.text: Assessment complete — the omitted PVC expansion fitting on the long exterior run is a code violation of NEC 352.44 (PVC's high thermal expansion coefficient requires fittings where length change ≥1/4"). Written to `/app/answer.json` as `fail`/medium risk, with corrective actions (calculate expansion via Table 352.44, install fitting, re-inspect before closing out).
